first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns is substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment due to the candidate's location. Both evaluations correctly identify the same key strengths (AI/MCP tooling, high-throughput systems) and the same core concerns (missing Python, lack of demonstrated architectural leadership).
